title: The Vital Algorithm: A Medical Thriller (Second Edition)
author: Walter Kyo Csoelle
description: Kindle Edition by Walter Kyo Csoelle. If an algorithm had to choose between saving a wealthy CEO or a beloved kindergarten teacher, how would it decide? Dr. Jana Bravcova returns to Bratislava to join MedCore, where VITAL-7 and the Social Utility Score price patients by economic value. As she uncovers a so-called glitch that was actually murder, she must choose between compliance and stopping the system. Written by Dr. Lubomir Polascin, this second edition adds a Developer's Cut appendix, an updated AI chapter for 2026, a new afterword ('Leaving the Factory'), and a reading group guide.

title: The Vital Algorithm: A Medical Thriller (Second Edition)
author: Walter Kyo Csoelle
description: Paperback - January 13, 2026 by Walter Kyo Csoelle. If an algorithm had to choose between saving a wealthy CEO or a beloved kindergarten teacher, how would it decide? Dr. Jana Bravcová returns to Bratislava to join MedCore and confronts VITAL-7, where the Social Utility Score prices human life. As she uncovers a so-called glitch that was actually murder, she must decide whether to comply or crash the system. Written by Dr. Ľubomír Polaščín, this second edition includes the Developer's Cut appendix, an updated AI chapter (2026), a new afterword (Leaving the Factory), and a reading group guide. Perfect for readers of Black Mirror and Robin Cook.

title: BLOOD EQUITY: Some Cures Are Deadlier Than Disease
author: Walter Kyo Csoelle
description: Kindle Edition by Walter Kyo Csoelle. In the post-socialist Republic of Carpathia, Severograd faces predatory healthcare corporatization as VitaCorp expands and targets independent nephrologist Dr. Andrej Varga. Refusing to sell his clinic, Varga uncovers lethal cost-cutting practices including involuntary discharge of unprofitable patients, reuse of single-use dialyzers, and shortened dialysis sessions. With whistleblower nurse Lena, he gathers evidence while enduring bureaucratic sabotage, media attacks, and physical intimidation. The conflict culminates at the EU Healthcare Summit, where Varga exposes falsified records, contaminated filters, and systemic corruption tied to corporate and political actors. Although key figures fall, the novel ends with a realistic warning that the deeper system remains and ethical medicine must be defended continuously.

title: Pulse Of The Body: A Novel of Medicine, Humanity, and the Edge of Life
author: Walter Kyo Csoelle
description: Hardcover - November 18, 2025 by Walter Kyo Csoelle. The novel follows Thomas Shimur, a former biology teacher with terminal kidney failure, as he enters a nephrology ward and confronts fear, grief, identity loss, and acceptance. Dr. Lea Mountchain, burdened by unresolved clinical trauma, and Prof. Victor Kraal, a visionary but ethically conflicted renal surgeon, become central to his journey. Across dialysis rooms, surgical theaters, ICU corridors, and family confrontations, the story explores dependence, dignity, informed choice, and the limits of intervention. Thomas undergoes radical surgery, survives into a fragile recovery period, rebuilds damaged relationships, and reaches a deeper acceptance of mortality. His eventual death transforms the ward: Lea embraces a more humane, narrative-centered model of care, while Kraal redefines success beyond technical triumph. Pulse of the Body portrays nephrology as a microcosm of human life where technology, ethics, love, guilt, hope, and grief intersect.

title: Blood Purification: Extracorporeal Elimination and Replacement (Print)
author: Lubomir Polascin
description: Available on Amazon: https://amzn.to/47hdmk5

title: Blood Purification: Extracorporeal Elimination Treatment (Kidney Replacement Book 1) Kindle Edition
author: Lubomir Polascin
description: Blood Purification. Extracorporeal elimination treatment. Dialysis interventions to achieve required blood composition changes in men by its artificial machine purification on the principles of diffusion/dialysis, convection (membrane filtration), adsorption and osmosis. A comprehensive textbook about the renal replacement therapy modalities with parts very helpful for people interesting with this topic as a patient, relative, friend of the patient, however, it can bring very valuable clinical information to medical doctors specialized in nephrology and other medical specialities, nurses, dialysis technicians and any other staff of a dialysis center or nephrology clinic. You are to find here descriptions of various features of hemodialysis, hemofiltration, hemodiafiltration, continuous renal replacement therapy, hepatic dialysis, methods to replace not only the function of the kidney but those of the liver too and many more.

title: Acute renal failure and acute kidney injury
author: Lubomir Polascin et al.
description: Academic paper highlighting these conditions as serious medical problems requiring collaboration among specialists and often intensive hospital care, including extracorporeal elimination therapy. Available on ResearchGate: https://www.researchgate.net/publication/323586471_Acute_renal_failure_and_acute_kidney_injury

description: Chapter in textbook Interná medicína (Hulín, Kiňová, team of authors).

title: DLHODOBÁ ÚSPEŠNÁ REMISIA IDIOPATICKEJ MEMBRÁNOVEJ NEFROPATIE APLIKÁCIOU PONTICELLIHO SCHÉMY IMUNOSUPRESÍVNEJ LIEČBY
author: Ľubomír Polaščín, Monika Alaxinová, Gabriela Karasová, Jana Kalatová
description: 38. kongres Slovenskej nefrologickej spoločnosti (Program a abstrakty). Abstract concerning long-term successful remission of idiopathic membranous nephropathy using the Ponticelli immunosuppressive treatment scheme.

title: Kontinuálna renálna nahrádzajúca terapia (KRNT, CRRT) pri AOP (AKI)
author: MUDr. Ľubomír Polaščín
description: Krajský nefrologický seminár – World Kidney Day, Bratislava. Specific clinical exploration on continuous renal replacement therapy in acute kidney injury.

title: Nefrológ Polaščín: Na zlyhanie obličiek by pacient v dnešnej dobe nemal zomrieť
author: Pravda.sk (Interview s Ľubomírom Polaščínom)
description: Major medical interview published in Pravda on February 9, 2015. Discusses Dr. Polaščín's medical journey, the intersection of medicine and engineering, and the state of modern dialysis.

title: Vliv použití dialyzačního roztoku s citrátovou složkou v kyselém koncentrátu na množství použitého heparinu při dialyzačním ošetření
author: L. Polaščín
description: Academic abstract presented at the conference "Vývoj léčby a ošetřovatelské péče u pacientů s onemocněním ledvin" (CNNA). Analyzing the impact of citrate component dialysate solutions on heparin dosing.

title: Medical Fasting: How to Use the Power of Starvation and Not Damage Your Metabolism
author: Lubomir Polascin
description: Digital product on Gumroad. Nephrologist's guide to safe reduction and autophagy (Nephro-Safe Protocol / Circadian Neera 2.0), focused on evidence-based fasting, kidney safety, electrolyte management, supplementation, circadian timing, and careful refeeding. 108 pages.

title: Medicínsky pôst. Ako využiť silu hladovania a nezničiť si metabolizmus.
author: Lubomir Polascin
description: Digitálny produkt na Gumroad. Bezpečnostný manuál k hladovaniu od nefrológa so zameraním na mýty o detoxikácii, riziká nesprávne vedeného hladovania, Nephro-Safe protokol Neera 2.0, cirkadiánny model a bezpečný návrat k strave. 106 strán.
